lines.english: What happened when the snake charmer began to play jazz?
lines.chinese: 耍蛇人开始演奏爵士乐时发生了什么？
lines.raw: What happened when the snake charmer began to play jazz? | 耍蛇人开始演奏爵士乐时发生了什么？

lines.english: As we had had a long walk through one of the markets of old Delhi,
lines.chinese: 我们在老德里的一处市场走了很长一段路之后，
lines.raw: As we had had a long walk through one of the markets of old Delhi, | 我们在老德里的一处市场走了很长一段路之后，

lines.english: we stopped at a square to have a rest.
lines.chinese: 在一个广场停下来休息。
lines.raw: we stopped at a square to have a rest. | 在一个广场停下来休息。

lines.english: After a time, we noticed a snake charmer with
lines.chinese: 过了一会儿，我们注意到广场的另一边有位耍蛇人，
lines.raw: After a time, we noticed a snake charmer with | 过了一会儿，我们注意到广场的另一边有位耍蛇人，

lines.english: two large baskets at the other side of the square,
lines.raw: two large baskets at the other side of the square, | 带着两个大篮子。

lines.english: so we went to have a look at him.
lines.raw: so we went to have a look at him. | 于是我们走过去看他。

lines.english: As soon as he saw us,
lines.raw: As soon as he saw us, | 他一看到我们，

lines.english: he picked up a long pipe which was covered with coins and opened one of the baskets.
lines.chinese: 便拿起一根盖满硬币的长笛，打开了一个篮子。
lines.raw: he picked up a long pipe which was covered with coins and opened one of the baskets. | 便拿起一根盖满硬币的长笛，打开了一个篮子。

lines.english: When he began to play a tune,
lines.raw: When he began to play a tune, | 当他开始吹奏曲子时，

lines.english: we had our first glimpse of the snake.
lines.chinese: 我们第一次瞥见了那条蛇。
lines.raw: we had our first glimpse of the snake. | 我们第一次瞥见了那条蛇。

lines.english: It rose out of the basket and began to follow the movements of the pipe.
lines.chinese: 它从篮子里钻出来，开始跟着长笛的动作舞动。
lines.raw: It rose out of the basket and began to follow the movements of the pipe. | 它从篮子里钻出来，开始跟着长笛的动作舞动。

lines.english: We were very much surprised when the snake charmer
lines.chinese: 当耍蛇人突然开始演奏爵士乐和现代流行歌曲时，
lines.raw: We were very much surprised when the snake charmer | 当耍蛇人突然开始演奏爵士乐和现代流行歌曲时，

lines.english: suddenly began to play jazz and modern pop songs.
lines.raw: suddenly began to play jazz and modern pop songs. | 我们感到非常惊讶。

lines.english: The snake, however, continued to 'dance' slowly.
lines.chinese: 然而，那条蛇却继续缓慢地“跳舞”。
lines.raw: The snake, however, continued to 'dance' slowly. | 然而，那条蛇却继续缓慢地“跳舞”。

lines.english: It obviously could not tell the difference between Indian music and jazz!
lines.chinese: 它显然分辨不出印度音乐和爵士乐的区别！
lines.raw: It obviously could not tell the difference between Indian music and jazz! | 它显然分辨不出印度音乐和爵士乐的区别！
